primary.$description: Microbird School Yellow — limited palette from Figma. Steps 1, 9, 10 mapped; others inherit from Acorn base.

9.$description: Hero yellow (Figma: bg dark / lighter highlight).

10.$description: Darker yellow for hover/active states (Figma: darker highlight).

overlay.$description: Microbird shared neutral gray (from Generic palette). Pure neutral — no warm sand tint like Acorn. Only steps 1, 3, 12 provided; others inherit from Acorn.

12.$description: Darkest neutral (Figma: Generic bg dark / Text dark).

link-active.$description: Active links use neutral dark (#222222). Yellow primary has insufficient contrast for accessible link text.
